channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 言語の教育とは、そのことばの種を渡して栽培法を伝えることではなかろうか――(本書「あとがき」より)。 近代日本の建設と…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
言語の教育とは、そのことばの種を渡して栽培法を伝えることではなかろうか――(本書「あとがき」より)。

近代日本の建設という大義のもと始まった日本語(国語)教育の現場には、ことばの種を分け与え大切に育もうと奔走した教師らと、その果実である日本語を自身の血肉として生き抜いた東西の学習者たちがいた。それぞれの知られざる物語に光を当て、日本語教育の今につながる流れを描き出す。

河路由佳
『日本語の種を渡す、受け取る　近代日本における日本語教育の誕生』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
言語の教育とは、そのことばの種を渡して栽培法を伝えることではなかろうか――(本書「あとがき」より)。

近代日本の建設という大義のもと始まった日本語(国語)教育の現場には、ことばの種を分け与え大切に育もうと奔走した教師らと、その果実である日本語を自身の血肉として生き抜いた東西の学習者たちがいた。それぞれの知られざる物語に光を当て、日本語教育の今につながる流れを描き出す。

河路由佳
『日本語の種を渡す、受け取る　近代日本における日本語教育の誕生』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...

item.title: ピーター・ターチン『エリート過剰生産が国家を滅ぼす』（早川書房、2024年）を隙間時間にパラパラと通読した。 大意を超…
item.author: 星 暁雄 (Akio Hoshi) (@akiohoshi.bsky.social)
item.description:
ピーター・ターチン『エリート過剰生産が国家を滅ぼす』（早川書房、2024年）を隙間時間にパラパラと通読した。

大意を超訳：
歴史上の内乱事案約100件を数理モデルで解析した。その結果、国が崩壊しないようにする方法は、

(1) 富の再配分をちゃんと実施して大衆を豊かにする。
(2) ポストを得らず不満を持っている高学歴エリート（余剰エリート、カウンターエリート）をなんとかする（●して人数を減らすとか、ポストを新設するとか）。

さもなければ、いずれ内戦や革命が起きる。

だいたい、こういう内容でした。
item.content:encoded:
ピーター・ターチン『エリート過剰生産が国家を滅ぼす』（早川書房、2024年）を隙間時間にパラパラと通読した。

大意を超訳：
歴史上の内乱事案約100件を数理モデルで解析した。その結果、国が崩壊しないようにする方法は、

(1) 富の再配分をちゃんと実施して大衆を豊かにする。
(2) ポストを得らず不満を持っている高学歴エリート（余剰エリート、カウンターエリート）をなんとかする（●して人数を減らすとか、ポストを新設するとか）。

さもなければ、いずれ内戦や革命が起きる。

だいたい、こういう内容でした。

item.title: The thing is, doing sports like Norway (focused on fun, comp…
item.author: David Roberts (@volts.wtf)
item.description: The thing is, doing sports like Norway (focused on fun, companionship, team spirit) rather than the US (focused on intensity, suffering, competition, which individual is "best") isn't just healthier & more pro-social, it produces *better athletes*.
item.content:encoded: The thing is, doing sports like Norway (focused on fun, companionship, team spirit) rather than the US (focused on intensity, suffering, competition, which individual is "best") isn't just healthier & more pro-social, it produces *better athletes*.

item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Ukraine wants joint investigation in Monaco bomb case, top prosecutor says reut.rs/4w3Knus
item.content:encoded: Ukraine wants joint investigation in Monaco bomb case, top prosecutor says reut.rs/4w3Knus

item.title: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked thro…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked through a window of a plane that had taken off from Thessaloniki, Greece, on Friday, the Greek news media reported. The man’s head was out the window as his wife held on to his legs, the reports said.
item.content:encoded: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked through a window of a plane that had taken off from Thessaloniki, Greece, on Friday, the Greek news media reported. The man’s head was out the window as his wife held on to his legs, the reports said.

item.title: 🐸エッセイ漫画734日目🐸 おこんばんは！✨ だんだんと夏めいて来ましたね🌻 皆様適宜涼をとりながら、熱中症など…

item.description:
🐸エッセイ漫画734日目🐸

おこんばんは！✨
だんだんと夏めいて来ましたね🌻
皆様適宜涼をとりながら、熱中症などお気をつけください🙏😉~🥤🧊🍧

#漫画が読めるハッシュタグ

item.title: I'm placing an order from some halal sushi from the Islamic…
item.author: KevTheRev (@kevtherev.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm placing an order from some halal sushi from the Islamic Republic of Japan before the 111% tariffs kick in.

You guys want anything?

Falafel roll?
Shwarma nigiri?

🤷‍♂️

item.title: 今日のお昼は、お弁当でした。 これで550円はお値打ちだと思うの。 ボリュームあるので、私はぎぼんぬと半分こしてます。 …
item.author: しろまむ (@shiromamu.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日のお昼は、お弁当でした。
これで550円はお値打ちだと思うの。
ボリュームあるので、私はぎぼんぬと半分こしてます。
この鯛ごはん弁当は一番人気で、早めに行かないと売り切れてることも多いのです。
今日は買えたので、ラッキー✌️
美味しかったです♪

#青空ごはん部
item.content:encoded:
今日のお昼は、お弁当でした。
これで550円はお値打ちだと思うの。
ボリュームあるので、私はぎぼんぬと半分こしてます。
この鯛ごはん弁当は一番人気で、早めに行かないと売り切れてることも多いのです。
今日は買えたので、ラッキー✌️
美味しかったです♪

#青空ごはん部

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small p…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small pieces of the New York New Jersey Stadium pitch, where the 2026 World Cup final will be played. They could bring in more than $11 million in revenue.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small pieces of the New York New Jersey Stadium pitch, where the 2026 World Cup final will be played. They could bring in more than $11 million in revenue.

item.title: ピーマンの肉詰めを作ってみた ピーマンの頭を落として半分に切る わたと種を取る 玉ねぎをみじん切りにする 少し粘りが…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
ピーマンの肉詰めを作ってみた

ピーマンの頭を落として半分に切る
わたと種を取る

玉ねぎをみじん切りにする
少し粘りが出る位まで、挽き肉と玉ねぎと卵を混ぜる
塩胡椒をする

醤油大さじ2、お酒大さじ2、砂糖大さじ1を混ぜておく

ピーマンの中に片栗粉をふる
スプーンを使ってお肉をピーマンの中に入れる

油を入れて、お肉のほうを裏にして焼く
何回かひっくり返す

一度取り出してフライパンをキッチンペーパーで拭く

ピーマンを戻してタレをかける
少し煮詰める

完成〜
item.content:encoded:
ピーマンの肉詰めを作ってみた

ピーマンの頭を落として半分に切る
わたと種を取る

玉ねぎをみじん切りにする
少し粘りが出る位まで、挽き肉と玉ねぎと卵を混ぜる
塩胡椒をする

醤油大さじ2、お酒大さじ2、砂糖大さじ1を混ぜておく

ピーマンの中に片栗粉をふる
スプーンを使ってお肉をピーマンの中に入れる

油を入れて、お肉のほうを裏にして焼く
何回かひっくり返す

一度取り出してフライパンをキッチンペーパーで拭く

ピーマンを戻してタレをかける
少し煮詰める

完成〜

item.title: ハイゼンベルクの『部分の全体』、みすず書房の人がいまでも良く売れているということを言っていた。歴史家としては、あれを歴史…
item.author: Kenji Ito 伊藤憲二 (@kenjiito.bsky.social)
item.description:
ハイゼンベルクの『部分の全体』、みすず書房の人がいまでも良く売れているということを言っていた。歴史家としては、あれを歴史的な記録だと思われるとすこし困るのだが、しかし、稀有な本であることに変わりはなく、読み継がれて欲しい本である。

qnc.mirai.nagoya-u.ac.jp/knowledge/dr...
item.content:encoded:
ハイゼンベルクの『部分の全体』、みすず書房の人がいまでも良く売れているということを言っていた。歴史家としては、あれを歴史的な記録だと思われるとすこし困るのだが、しかし、稀有な本であることに変わりはなく、読み継がれて欲しい本である。

qnc.mirai.nagoya-u.ac.jp/knowledge/dr...

item.title: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characte…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.
item.content:encoded: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.

item.title: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settle…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settled with the owner and operator of the Keystone Pipeline over alleged violations of the Clean Water Act stemming from a 2022 oil spill.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settled with the owner and operator of the Keystone Pipeline over alleged violations of the Clean Water Act stemming from a 2022 oil spill.

item.title: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be able to withstand sweltering temperatures of 131 degrees Fahrenheit, as it gears up for a radically altered European climate over the coming decades. https://cnn.it/4f2XxjW
item.content:encoded: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be able to withstand sweltering temperatures of 131 degrees Fahrenheit, as it gears up for a radically altered European climate over the coming decades. https://cnn.it/4f2XxjW

item.title: Good morning. Happy Friday. Flowing, we reflect our light, w…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning. Happy Friday.
Flowing, we reflect our light, what darkens. In calm, we adjust our angle, shadow disappears, clarity shining.
Have a beautiful day.
#Scape #photography #landscapephotography #ForestFriday #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #vermont
item.content:encoded:
Good morning. Happy Friday.
Flowing, we reflect our light, what darkens. In calm, we adjust our angle, shadow disappears, clarity shining.
Have a beautiful day.
#Scape #photography #landscapephotography #ForestFriday #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #vermont

item.title: NEW: Citing ProPublica’s reporting, two lawmakers have calle…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description: NEW: Citing ProPublica’s reporting, two lawmakers have called on the CDC to address a “preventable public health crisis” of parents refusing the vitamin K shot for their newborns — which has led to babies suffering uncontrollable bleeding and even dying.
item.content:encoded: NEW: Citing ProPublica’s reporting, two lawmakers have called on the CDC to address a “preventable public health crisis” of parents refusing the vitamin K shot for their newborns — which has led to babies suffering uncontrollable bleeding and even dying.

item.title: My mom was a really really really good Gardener and I am not…
item.author: Christopher Crawford (@myohwhy.bsky.social)
item.description: My mom was a really really really good Gardener and I am not. But I have done my best to keep this area of the yard looking good because I just know she would strike me down if not. It's really pretty. I think so anyway.
item.content:encoded: My mom was a really really really good Gardener and I am not. But I have done my best to keep this area of the yard looking good because I just know she would strike me down if not. It's really pretty. I think so anyway.

item.title: Jarell Quansah has his red card ban extended to two matches.…
item.author: HIGNFY (@hignfy.bsky.social)
item.description: Jarell Quansah has his red card ban extended to two matches. FIFA will consider an appeal, if the England defender can prove he’s either American or Argentinian or a brown envelope stuffed with cash
item.content:encoded: Jarell Quansah has his red card ban extended to two matches. FIFA will consider an appeal, if the England defender can prove he’s either American or Argentinian or a brown envelope stuffed with cash

item.title: "I don’t know what to do and all I have left is a small glim…
item.author: kgwirth.bsky.social (@kgwirth.bsky.social)
item.description:
"I don’t know what to do and all I have left is a small glimmer of hope. My husband is in critical condition, his mother is too and every day one of my daughters falls ill. The weight on my heart and body is unbearable 💔

Your help keeps us alive 💜

Please help my family"

chuffed.org/project/omsham
item.content:encoded:
"I don’t know what to do and all I have left is a small glimmer of hope. My husband is in critical condition, his mother is too and every day one of my daughters falls ill. The weight on my heart and body is unbearable 💔

Your help keeps us alive 💜

Please help my family"

chuffed.org/project/omsham

item.title: While I’m away dropping off dogs and visiting our mobile tea…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
While I’m away dropping off dogs and visiting our mobile teams the guys back at the land are helping Tofu through his final journey.

I had no idea they were doing this. Was emotional seeing it myself. A very good boy
item.content:encoded:
While I’m away dropping off dogs and visiting our mobile teams the guys back at the land are helping Tofu through his final journey.

I had no idea they were doing this. Was emotional seeing it myself. A very good boy

item.title: Eberyday Sints munnyday Da mama hads A hurty hed Yesserday…
item.author: Cheddar (@fartycheddarcat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Eberyday
Sints munnyday
Da mama hads
A hurty hed

Yesserday
She not get up
She sleep all day
And be no fun

But I be good
I cuddles close
I takes care of her
Til she all better

#HurtyHed #Mygwaine #NotFair #IMakesShurFiggyBeGoodToo #IStaysCloseToMamaAllDay
item.content:encoded:
Eberyday
Sints munnyday
Da mama hads
A hurty hed

Yesserday
She not get up
She sleep all day
And be no fun

But I be good
I cuddles close
I takes care of her
Til she all better

#HurtyHed #Mygwaine #NotFair #IMakesShurFiggyBeGoodToo #IStaysCloseToMamaAllDay

item.title: The Senate returns from recess Monday, nearly a month after …
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The Senate returns from recess Monday, nearly a month after McConnell was hospitalized on June 14.
item.content:encoded: The Senate returns from recess Monday, nearly a month after McConnell was hospitalized on June 14.

item.title: Our body remembers that it once came from dust, water, miner…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Our body remembers that it once came from dust, water, mineral, blood, and breath. Mother Earth asks us to remember that we belong to her. Not as owners. As children. Temporary ones. We arrive empty-handed. We take shelter, food, beauty, medicine, and breath. Then one day, we return everything.
item.content:encoded: Our body remembers that it once came from dust, water, mineral, blood, and breath. Mother Earth asks us to remember that we belong to her. Not as owners. As children. Temporary ones. We arrive empty-handed. We take shelter, food, beauty, medicine, and breath. Then one day, we return everything.

item.title: Along the Icefields Parkway. One of the most scenic drives i…
item.author: Tommy Farnsworth -- tf PhotoScapes (@tommyfarnsworth.com)
item.description:
Along the Icefields Parkway. One of the most scenic drives in the world, the Icefields Parkway through Banff & Jasper National Parks in Alberta, Canada.

tapestry.tommyfarnsworth.com
item.content:encoded:
Along the Icefields Parkway. One of the most scenic drives in the world, the Icefields Parkway through Banff & Jasper National Parks in Alberta, Canada.
